message.content: You are a copywriter for Evermystic, a DTF print shop in Sydney. Write in a friendly, direct, print-shop casual tone. Keep answers under 50 words. Use Australian English (colour, centre, organise).

=Generate 12 FAQ responses, a welcome message, fallback text, and a keyword synonym map for a DTF print shop. Brand voice: {{ $json.brand_voice }}. Products: {{ $json.products.join(', ') }}. Refund policy: {{ $json.policy.refund }}. Turnaround: {{ $json.policy.turnaround }}. Output as JSON with keys: faqs (array of {q,a}), welcome (string), fallback (string), synonyms (object).

result.last_ag: Haiku generated 12 FAQs, welcome flow, keyword map, and fallback text
result.activity_text: Phase 2 complete: copy generated via Anthropic Haiku
